channel.title: Ca Phe Sua Da on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Ca Phe Sua Da on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: What Is Vietnamese Coffee? A Complete Guide to Cà Phê, Phin Filter Brewing, and the World's Most Distinctive Coffee Tradition
item.description: Vietnamese coffee is robusta-based, slow-dripped through a phin filter, and famously sweetened with condensed milk. This guide covers the 1857 French colonial origin, the phin technique, cà phê sữa đá and cà phê trứng, Buon Ma Thuot's coffee belt, and how Vietnamese coffee compares to Italian espresso and Cuban café cubano.
